title: Fix ProductDetail page to show all variants & nutritional info; fix Admin page

requirements.summary: Rewrite useGetProductByCategory hook to correctly fetch product data by category slug
acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /products/rice calls getProductByCategory with argument 'rice' and returns the rice ProductDetail record
Navigating to /products/wheat calls getProductByCategory with argument 'wheat' and returns the wheat ProductDetail record
All six slugs (rice, wheat, pulses, spices, processed-food-products, makhana) successfully fetch their respective records
When the backend returns null or empty optional, the hook returns { data: undefined, isNotFound: true } without crashing
Query is disabled (enabled: false) when productId is undefined

file_operations.description: Rewrite the useGetProductByCategory hook to accept a category parameter, call actor.getProductByCategory(category) with the exact category slug from the URL productId parameter, enable the query only when category is defined and non-empty, handle null/undefined/empty optional responses from the backend by returning { data: undefined, isNotFound: true } without throwing errors, and return the unwrapped ProductDetail data. Use proper TypeScript typing for Option<ProductDetail> response handling.

requirements.summary: Rewrite ProductDetail page to display complete product information including all variants and nutritional data
acceptanceCriteria: Loading spinner or skeleton shown while product data is being fetched
'Product not found' message displayed when backend returns no data for the slug
Product name, description, price in ₹, and category are visible
Specifications table renders all key-value pairs from the backend record
Nutritional information section renders per-gram values for all fields returned by the backend (calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, minerals)
Product Variants grid shows all variants with name and image
Variant selector dropdown is pre-populated with all variant names
Quantity selector defaults to 1 and supports increment/decrement
Add to Cart button calls addToCart with selected variantName, unitPrice, and quantity
Success toast notification shown after adding to cart

file_operations.description: Rewrite the ProductDetail page to extract productId from URL params using TanStack Router's useParams, pass it to useGetProductByCategory hook, display loading state while fetching, show 'Product not found' message when data is null/undefined, and on success render: product name, category, description, price formatted in ₹, specifications table with all key-value pairs, a dedicated Nutritional Information section displaying per-gram values for calories, protein, carbohydrates, fat, fiber, and minerals fields, a Product Variants grid showing all variants with their names and images loaded from frontend/public/assets/generated/ using exact filenames (e.g., rice-basmati.dim_400x300.png), a variant selector dropdown pre-populated with all variant names from the backend, a quantity selector defaulting to 1 with +/- controls, and an Add to Cart button that calls addToCart from CartContext with productId (converted from bigint), productName, selected variantName, quantity (as number), and unitPrice (converted from bigint). Show a success toast notification after adding to cart. Reference generated images using their exact workspace paths: frontend/public/assets/generated/rice-basmati.dim_400x300.png, rice-sona-masoori.dim_400x300.png, rice-ir64.dim_400x300.png, rice-brown.dim_400x300.png, rice-broken.dim_400x300.png, wheat-durum.dim_400x300.png, wheat-whole.dim_400x300.png, wheat-semolina.dim_400x300.png, pulses-chana-dal.dim_400x300.png, pulses-moong-dal.dim_400x300.png, pulses-masoor-dal.dim_400x300.png, pulses-urad-dal.dim_400x300.png, pulses-toor-dal.dim_400x300.png, pulses-rajma.dim_400x300.png, pulses-kabuli-chana.dim_400x300.png, spices-turmeric.dim_400x300.png, spices-red-chilli.dim_400x300.png, spices-coriander.dim_400x300.png, spices-cumin.dim_400x300.png, spices-black-pepper.dim_400x300.png, spices-cardamom.dim_400x300.png, spices-ginger-powder.dim_400x300.png, spices-fenugreek.dim_400x300.png, processed-rice-flour.dim_400x300.png, processed-wheat-flour.dim_400x300.png, processed-besan.dim_400x300.png, processed-poha.dim_400x300.png, processed-roasted-chana.dim_400x300.png, processed-vermicelli.dim_400x300.png, makhana-regular.dim_400x300.png, makhana-premium.dim_400x300.png, makhana-roasted.dim_400x300.png, makhana-powder.dim_400x300.png. Do not remove or break any existing working sections (product image, specifications table).

requirements.summary: Fix and fully restore the Admin page with Contact Submissions and Orders tabs
acceptanceCriteria: Admin page loads without a white screen or runtime error
'Contact Submissions' tab renders a table with all submitted contact form entries
'Orders' tab renders a table with all orders from useGetAllOrders
Status dropdown per order row updates order status via useUpdateOrderStatus
No TypeScript compilation errors in Admin.tsx
All imports resolve correctly (no missing module errors)

file_operations.description: Fix and fully restore the Admin page to render two tabs without any import errors or TypeScript type errors. Tab 1: 'Contact Submissions' — use useGetAllContactForms hook to fetch all contact form submissions and display them in a table with columns: Name, Email, Phone Number, Message, User Type. Tab 2: 'Orders' — use useGetAllOrders hook to fetch all orders and display them in a table with columns: Order ID, Buyer Name, Email, Phone, Total Amount (formatted in ₹), Status, Date (formatted from createdAt bigint timestamp). Each order row must include a status dropdown (with options: pending, confirmed, processing, shipped, delivered, cancelled) that calls useUpdateOrderStatus mutation when changed. Audit and fix all imports: verify useGetAllOrders and useUpdateOrderStatus are imported from '../hooks/useQueries', verify useGetAllContactForms is imported from '../hooks/useQueries', verify CartContext is imported if needed, and resolve any missing or broken import paths. Fix any TypeScript type errors related to Order, ContactFormEntry, OrderStatus enum, or bigint to number conversions. Ensure the page loads without runtime errors or white screens.

Verify that useGetAllContactForms, useGetAllOrders, and useUpdateOrderStatus hooks are correctly implemented and exported. useGetAllContactForms must call actor.getAllContactForms() and return an array of ContactFormEntry. useGetAllOrders must call actor.getAllOrders() and return an array of Order. useUpdateOrderStatus must be a mutation that calls actor.updateOrderStatus(orderId, status) and invalidates the 'allOrders' query key on success. If any of these hooks are missing or incomplete, implement them following the existing pattern in the file. Ensure proper TypeScript typing for all return values and parameters.

requirements.summary: Verify CartContext provider is fully implemented and all cart/checkout routes are registered
acceptanceCriteria: CartContext is available on all pages without errors
addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart functions work correctly
cartTotal and itemCount are correctly computed
Cart icon in navigation shows correct item count
'/cart', '/checkout', '/order-confirmation/$orderId' routes render their respective pages without 404 errors

file_operations.description: Verify that CartContext is fully implemented with all required functions: addToCart (accepts productId as string or number, productName, variantName, quantity as number, unitPrice as number), removeFromCart (accepts productId and variantName), updateQuantity (accepts productId, variantName, and new quantity), clearCart (empties the cart), and derived values: cartTotal (sum of all item subtotals), itemCount (total quantity of all items). Each cart item must include: productId (string), productName (string), variantName (string), quantity (number), unitPrice (number). Ensure CartProvider wraps children and provides the context value. If any function or field is missing, add it. Verify cartTotal and itemCount calculations are correct.

Verify that CartProvider wraps the entire app (inside QueryClientProvider, wrapping the RouterProvider). Verify that the following routes are registered in the TanStack Router configuration: '/cart' (lazy-loaded Cart component), '/checkout' (lazy-loaded Checkout component), '/order-confirmation/$orderId' (lazy-loaded OrderConfirmation component with orderId route parameter). If any route is missing, add it following the existing lazy-loading pattern. Ensure all three routes render their respective page components without 404 errors.

requirements.summary: Generate and wire all 33 product variant images into the frontend
acceptanceCriteria: All 33 image files exist at frontend/public/assets/generated/ with the exact filenames listed
Variant images load without 404 errors on both the Products page and ProductDetail pages
Each image visually represents the corresponding ingredient or product

Map each variant's imageUrl field from the backend (e.g., 'rice-basmati.png') to the corresponding generated file in /assets/generated/ by constructing the full path at runtime. Update any hardcoded image references or fallback mappings to use the generated files from frontend/public/assets/generated/. Ensure all subcategory images load without 404 errors.
